description: A reader requests only a subset of the seed's documents, ends with a stable partial store, and accepted heads are correct for the requested subset only (PROTOCOL §8).

assertions.description: Reader successfully synced the requested document subset without errors.
Reader store contains only objects for the requested documents; no objects for excluded documents are present.
Reader accepted heads for the requested document match the seed's heads for that document.

notes: Proves M4 production replication sub-item 3: partial-doc selective sync.
PROTOCOL §8 states partial replication is supported: a reader may request only a subset of the seed's documents.
Seed holds doc:partial-alpha and doc:partial-beta. Reader requests only doc:partial-alpha.
After sync: reader store has objects only for doc:partial-alpha; accepted heads match seed.
